subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken around 1914-09-07
subcodes.first_line: The star of the fortune of some people is always on the ascendant. They are chosen by God to perform certain services in the world of humanity.
subcodes.subjects: @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @thankfulness; gratitude
